## Checklist

- [ ] Skill targets iOS, Swift, or SwiftUI specifically
- [ ] Skill is installable via `npx skills add` or from a public repo
- [ ] Skill passes security audit on skills.sh (Safe or Low Risk)
- [ ] I added it to the correct category table in README.md
- [ ] I added the install command to the category's details block
- [ ] I followed the existing table format
- [ ] I tested that the skill actually works

## Are you the skill author?

- [ ] Yes, I maintain this skill
- [ ] No, I'm recommending someone else's skill
